percentage.title: Minimum percentage of attributes with values.

direction.title: Relation direction. Applicable only for TWO_WAY relations. DIRECT means the original direction, REVERSE means the opposite direction.

includeSubcategories.title: Product is added to required category or any of its sub-categories.

weight.title: Requirement weight. Max 6 digits, no fractional digits. Defaults to 1.

ValidationDetails.description:
Subtypes mapping
| Requirement details | Requirement types |
|---|---|
| CompoundAttributeDefinitionValidationDetails | MISSING_COMPOUND_ATTRIBUTE |
| AttributeDefinitionValidationDetails | INVALID_ATTRIBUTE_VALUE |
| DictionaryValueFilterValidationDetails | DICTIONARY_VALUE_NOT_EXIST_IN_FILTER |
| VariantAttributesValidationDetails | MISSING_VARIANT_ATTRIBUTE, MISSING_VARIANT_VALUE, INVALID_VARIANT_VALUE|
| CategoryAttributesValidationDetails | MISSING_CATEGORY_ATTRIBUTE, MISSING_CATEGORY_VALUE, INVALID_CATEGORY_VALUE|

entityIds.title: Array of entity IDs to validate.

context.title: Context in which the validation is performed.

data.title: List of validation results for entities.

pageSize.title: Size of a block of items to return. It corresponds with the page parameter.

page.title: A number sequence representing a block of items to return as a result set.

sourceEventId.title: Source event id that triggered score computation.

entityLastUpdate.title: Date of the last product update in pim.

contexts.title: List of contexts to return score for. Returns score for all contexts by default.

categoryIds.title: List of categoryIds to return score for. Returns score for all categories by default.

includeUnassigned.title: Indicates whether the response should include a score for unassigned products. Default: true.

pageSize.title: Size of a block of items to return. It corresponds with the page parameter.

page.title: A number sequence representing a block of items to return as a result set.

entityId.description: EntityId is deprecated. Please use entityIds field.
entityId.title: Entity id.

ids.title: Ids of requirements to include in response.

types.title: Types of requirements to include in response.

pageSize.title: Size of a block of items to return. It corresponds with the page parameter.

page.title: A number sequence representing a block of items to return as a result set.

ids.title: Ids of requirements to include in response.

types.title: Types of requirements to include in response.

sourceEventId.title: Source event id that triggered score computation.

pimLastUpdate.title: Date of last update product in pim.

recalculationRequired.title: Flag indicate if recalculation is required.

conflictingEntities.title: Additional entity id list related to error

quotaLimitExceededDetails.title: Additional details related to quota limit exceeded errors

entityId.title: Identifier of the related entity causing the conflict
ID of the entity that violated the quota

entityType.title: Type of the entity that violated the quota
